description: HMH Holding Inc. provides offshore and onshore oil and gas drilling equipment and systems and services in the United States and Norway. The company's services include sales of projects and products including drilling equipment packages for newbuild or a reactivated drilling rig, and individual or grouped components of drilling and pressure control equipment. The company also offers aftermarket services including services and replacement parts on installed equipment and integrated digital solutions. The company sells equipment and services to drilling contractors; operators, including both oil
